REQ-005.basis: Local metric snapshot tests verify failed order collection leaves order_count, total_amount, roi, and cac as null instead of polluting metrics with numeric zero.

REQ-006.basis: Local metric delta tests verify today cumulative snapshot deltas, ROI/CAC deltas, missing previous snapshot handling, late previous snapshot handling, and decreasing cumulative values as invalid.

REQ-010.basis: Local abnormal status handling is covered, but live Qianniu/Feishu write-readback evidence cannot be produced without the external runtime and credentials.

evidence.detail: Existing docs/auto-execute/results/T07.json was rejected as stale/invalid because ConvertFrom-Json failed and the file did not contain task_pack_id shopops-goal-2026-06-03.

shopops/services/metric_service.py currently computes safe ROI/CAC, avoids zero substitution on failed collections, marks missing previous snapshots, invalidates late intervals over 30 minutes, and invalidates decreasing cumulative order, GMV, or cost values.
No live Feishu app/table environment variables were present and Qianniu CDP http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version was not reachable.

blockers.detail: FEISHU_APP_ID, FEISHU_APP_SECRET, FEISHU_APP_TOKEN, FEISHU_TABLE_MONITOR_SNAPSHOT, FEISHU_TABLE_ORDERS_RAW, FEISHU_TABLE_PROMOTION_SNAPSHOT, FEISHU_TABLE_METRICS_10MIN, and FEISHU_TABLE_TASK_LOG were absent, so live snapshot/delta upsert and readback could not be verified.
QIANNIU_CDP_URL was absent and the fallback probe to http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version failed, so live Qianniu source collection could not be verified.

next_actions: When live Feishu Bitable credentials and table ids are available, rerun only T07 live write/upsert/readback verification.
When an authenticated Qianniu PC CDP session is available, rerun only T07 live collection and delta verification.
